calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Ross, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525.
9:00am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal re-hearing. Motion for re-hearing by Mr. Berger was granted on feb-12-08, by Judge Pro Tem Ross. Both parties are present in court. Arkady Berger, Appellant appears in Pro Per; Philip Whitehead, Respondent, appears in Pro Per. Kevin Peng and and Kevin O'Connor appear with Respondent as witnesses. Parties and witnesses are re-sworn.
9:03AM
For the record, Judge Pro Tem, Ross states, and Mr. Berger agrees, that Mr. Berger is present to argue on his behalf against Mr. Whitehead's claim against him. Mr. Berger testifies in the narrative.(Respondent's exhibits were previously returned, and are returned to the Court for this hearing. Mr. Whitehead appears in Court with his exhibits.)
EXHA(D) 2nd Contract
EXHA(E) Architectural drawings and specifications
EXHA(F) Packet of documents with an invoice 97-6
10:12AM
Mr. Whitehead then testifies in the narrative.
EXH16 Document dated Feb-27-08, showing costs disputing Mr. Berger's figures
EXH17 Consultation meeting documents
10:30AM
Mr. Berger responds, and Judge Ross also questions parties
10:40AM
The matter is submitted. Evidence is retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Ross, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525.
9:22am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Both parties are present in court. Arkady Berger, Appellant appears in Pro Per; Philip Whitehead, Respondent, appears in Pro Per. Parties having been previously sworn testify in the narrative. Kevin Peng and Kevin O'Connor appear with the respondent as witnesses. Witnesses were previously sworn.
EXHR1 Correspondence
EXHR2 Correspondence
EXHR3 Demolition invoice
EXHR4 Bill
EXHR5 Bill
EXHR6 Bill
EXHR7 Bill
EXHR8 Bill
EXHR9 email dated 5/16/07
EXHR10 Contract cover sheet dated 7/18/07
EXHR11 Invoice dated 8/4/07
10:40am
Court takes a recess from this case to hear other matters.
12:45pm
Court reconvenes. All present.Parties continue to testify in the narrative.
EXHR12 Permit detail reports (2)
EXHA(A) Work scope
EXHR13 10/8/07 correspondence from Robles & Associates
EXHR4(B) Work scope
EXHA(C) 1st Contract
EXHR(14)Bill
EXHR(15)Bill
1:35pm
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted

Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
